docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHAUHAN, ABEDA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: RM 335 DOREL HOTEL, 1507 CALIFORNIA ST., LEASE FORFEITED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUHAN, ABEDA SERVED FEB-11-1993, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $11.00 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUHAN, ABEDA
RENT DEPOSIT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUHAN, ABEDA AS TO DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS
DECLARATION IN LIEU OF PERSONAL TESTIMONY FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUHAN, ABEDA
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS STAYED UNTIL MAR-09-1993
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAUHAN, ABEDA AS TO DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED UNSATISFIED; SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FRIERSON, CARTIS
